description.zh: 纯 tool plugin (modules/02 §201-§214) · 暴露 balance:resim — 对指定 scenario 跑 N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟、返回 winRate + 95% CI,跑 in-process worker。给 /make-game-design 与 wb-balance 共用。
description.en: Pure-tool plugin. Exposes balance:resim — N PvP/PvE resims for a scenario returning winRate + 95% CI. Runs in-process worker. Shared by /make-game-design and wb-balance.
